meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure your MVP delivers immediate value.
content.answer_block: Project stagnation stems from a lack of immediate user value. By implementing a frictionless onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment within seconds. This validates your product, builds retention, and transforms unfinished ideas into revenue-generating SaaS assets that keep users engaged from the very first login.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: a graveyard of half-baked repositories, abandoned MVPs, and the crushing weight of 'feature creep.' You’re not failing because your code is bad; you’re failing because your users aren't reaching the value proposition fast enough. When the user doesn't see the benefit, they churn, and you lose the motivation to build. It’s a death spiral of unfinished projects.

But the pivot is simple. Stop building features and start building a bridge. A high-conversion onboarding flow is the difference between a side project and a business. By automating the journey from signup to success, you force yourself to define the core value, finish the MVP, and watch your metrics climb.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides value. If the user doesn't hit this in 60 seconds, they leave. We map this to a simplified UI flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project goals and suggest a 3-step 'Aha!' sequence that minimizes clicks to first value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Identify the core value proposition and outline a 3-step onboarding flow.'

steps.title: Build the Skeleton UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold the onboarding screens. Keep it lean; focus on input collection, not aesthetic perfection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive React onboarding component with progress tracking and a call-to-action button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create onboarding wizard component with state management for progress tracking.'

steps.title: Implement Progressive Profiling
steps.description: Don't ask for everything at once. Collect data only when necessary to reduce friction and increase conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow to use progressive profiling, capturing only email initially, then preferences later.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement progressive profiling in the onboarding wizard to minimize initial form fields.'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Connect the onboarding completion to a backend event that triggers the actual service, ensuring the user feels immediate impact.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a backend service trigger that initializes the user profile upon completion of the onboarding wizard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Set up backend event listener for onboarding completion and trigger user initialization.'

steps.title: Deploy and Measure
steps.description: Use Claude Code to push to staging and verify the flow works end-to-end without bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test plan for the onboarding flow to ensure every step validates correctly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Verify onboarding flow functionality and ensure user data persists correctly.'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card during onboarding; focus on the product experience first to build trust.
Use 'skeleton screens' instead of loading spinners to make the app feel faster to the user.
Implement a 'skip' button; power users will appreciate the option to dive straight into your dashboard.
Track the drop-off rate at every single step of your onboarding to identify exactly where your funnel leaks.
Keep your copy benefit-driven; tell them why they are doing this step, not just what data you need.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, start A/B testing the copy on your CTA buttons and monitor your conversion rates for 72 hours before making further UI changes.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas rot in a folder. Build a system that converts users into customers and keeps you shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
